title: Deleted emails don't get deleted in other email apps
creator: bugeater328
content:
Hi 

 When I use Thunderbird for Android and delete an email it no longer appears in Thunderbird as it should. However if I switch to K-9 Mail it hasn't been deleted. It doesn't matter how many times I try to sync my mailboxes. Is this expected or is something wrong with Thunderbird for Android? If I do the same on Thunderbird on Mac it works just fine. This is currently keeping me from fully switching to Thunderbird for Android on my phone...

The Veritable Bugeater

title: geen correcte weergave van mails
creator: tom.elegeert
content:
Sinds de laatste update van Thunderbird worden de e-mails op mijn smartphone niet meer correct weergegeven.

Bovenaan zie ik steeds enkele pixels van de e-mails. Als ik een eind naar beneden scroll, vind ik dan wel de e-mails, maar volledig uit proportie, dat "skewed".

Zie screenshots.

Groeten, Tom

title: Where does Thunderbird for Android save POP3 Mailboxes (for Backup Reasons)?
creator: jasomin
content: I want to use POP3 (limited Serverspace). When the mails are deleted on the server and stored on the phone, i would like to backup the mailbox. Where does Thunderbird for Android save POP3 Mailboxes? OR Is there a Backup-Restore Feature for POP3 Mailboxes? Thaks a lot!
